code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let v = if neg
          0 - cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else if b == 43
      cur = cur
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut max_so_far = 0
  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if first
      max_so_far = v
      first = false
    else if v > max_so_far
      max_so_far = v
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_so_far)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let r = result.len()
  while k < r
    let v = match result.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
